rules.description: Each character has a stable slot with character_id, left/right/center, depth_order, and reference priority.
Faces, hairlines, body silhouettes, and outfits must not merge between characters.
Height/body scale must match Character Bible and environment scale anchors.
Any occlusion must be declared as allowed, limited, or blocked for each character.
If touch/contact is important, hands/contact points must be framed and in focus.
Foreground/midground/background order must be explicit for multi-character shots.
